core_mechanism: constrained maximum-entropy variational principle — maximizing an entropy functional subject to a full set of conserved-quantity constraints (in both fixed-constraint 'microcanonical' and Lagrange-multiplier 'canonical' formulations), whose multiple stationary points yield distinct, possibly symmetry-broken equilibrium states
brief_reason: The abstract frames the method as a mixing-entropy maximization problem that takes into account all Casimir invariants and is solved in canonical and microcanonical forms, yielding multiple equilibria including symmetry-broken solutions.
